data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding selector types.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for selector types, but the evidence provided does not include any details about the necessary credential request object or its linkage to the specific opening. Without this critical information, it is impossible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or not. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of a credential request object linked to the source opening/task subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
